sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْمُهِمِّ تَحْقِيقُ التَّوَازُنِ بَيْنَ الْعَمَلِ وَالْحَيَاةِ الْخَاصَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Važno je postići ravnotežu između posla i privatnog života.
sentences.translationEn: It is important to achieve a balance between work and private life.

sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي خَالِدٌ وَقْتًا مَعَ عَائِلَتِهِ بَعْدَ انْتِهَاءِ الدَّوَامِ.
sentences.translation: Halid provodi vrijeme sa svojom porodicom nakon završetka radnog vremena.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid spends time with his family after work hours end.

sentences.arabic: يُمَارِسُ الرِّيَاضَةَ بَانْتِظَامٍ لِيُحَافِظَ عَلَى صِحَّتِهِ وَنَشَاطِهِ.
sentences.translation: Redovno se bavi sportom kako bi očuvao svoje zdravlje i energiju.
sentences.translationEn: He exercises regularly to maintain his health and energy.
